query: UPDATE savedQuotes SET casePickRate = 0.40, layerPickRate = 0.30, palletSupplyFee = 9.00, shrinkWrapFee = 3.00, labelingFee = 0.50, orderProcessingFee = 10.00, cancellationFee = 25.00 WHERE id IN (1, 2, 3, 30001, 30002, 30003, 60001);
